heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 971 to 975 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 971, , pt. II, § 240, , provided for active duty with or without pay. See , Armed Forces.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 492section 12315 of Title 10
